userMessage: what do you see o nthe scope?

response.text: Done — The scope is showing an eye diagram with jitter analysis on Ref1: data rate about 2.501 Gb/s, period 1.066 ns, eye width about 345.9 ps, TIE jitter σ about 8.68 ps, total jitter about 54.07 ps, RJ about 1.68 ps, DJ about 33.75 ps, plus TIE histogram, TIE spectrum, bathtub curve, and waveform view.
